LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BLUE & GOLD FLEET LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, WAS HEARD THIS DAY. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED.
